name: bilig
description: Local-first spreadsheet engine monorepo with React playground, custom reconciler, and AssemblyScript/WASM fast path.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @bilig/protocol build && pnpm --filter @bilig/formula build && pnpm --filter @bilig/crdt build && pnpm --filter @bilig/binary-protocol build && pnpm --filter @bilig/agent-api build && pnpm --filter @bilig/storage-browser build && pnpm --filter @bilig/storage-server build && pnpm --filter @bilig/excel-fixtures build && pnpm --filter @bilig/wasm-kernel build && pnpm --filter @bilig/core build && pnpm --filter @bilig/worker-transport build && pnpm --filter @bilig/renderer build && pnpm --filter @bilig/grid build && pnpm --filter @bilig/benchmarks build && pnpm --filter @bilig/local-server build && pnpm --filter @bilig/sync-server build && pnpm --filter @bilig/web build && pnpm --filter @bilig/playground build
scripts.publish:check: node scripts/clean-package-builds.mjs && pnpm build && node scripts/check-package-publish.mjs
scripts.ci: pnpm protocol:check && pnpm naming:check && pnpm lint && pnpm wasm:build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm coverage && node scripts/coverage-contracts.mjs && pnpm bench:smoke && pnpm bench:contracts && pnpm exec playwright install chromium && pnpm test:browser && pnpm release:check
scripts.ci:strict: pnpm run ci && git diff --exit-code && git diff --cached --exit-code
